title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube South Asia Partners:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube South Asia Partners!
